title: EasyOptimized
description: ModPack with some few optimization Mods!
body:
ModPack with some few optimization Mods for better Vanilla Experience! 


Mods:

-Sodium

-Reese's Sodium Options

-Sodium Extra

-Translations for Sodium

-Indium

-Nvidium

-Iris Shaders

-FerriteCore

-ImmediatelyFast

-Memory Leak Fix

-Starlight (Fabric)

-Continuity

-Fabric Language Kotlin

-YetAnotherConfigLib

-Xaeros's Minimap

-Zoomify

-Shulker Box Tooltip

-AppleSkin

-Coordinates Display

-Dark Loading Screen

Texture Packs:

-3D-Textures by Vanilla Tweaks

-Default Dark Mode

Shaders:

-Complementary Shaders - Reimagined

-Complementary Shaders - Unbound
